stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The prevailing surface wind in the area of the west coast of Africa north of the equator (gulf of Guinea) is a:

options.a: NE tradewind in summer and SE tradewind in winter.
options.b: NE monsoon in winter and SE tradewind in summer.
options.c: SW monsoon in summer and NE tradewind in winter.
options.d: SW monsoon in winter and NE monsoon in summer.
